title: sisymbrium amphibium subsp. aquaticum
intro: Sisymbrium amphibium subsp. aquaticum, also known as water rocket or water chickweed, is a subspecies of the Sisymbrium amphibium plant that grows in aquatic environments. It is a flowering plant used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Sisymbrium amphibium subsp. aquaticum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and skin conditions. Sisymbrium amphibium subsp. aquaticum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
